name: BatteryService
description: Simulates a Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) tracking State of Charge (SoC).

calculations.name: battery_state
calculations.description: Publishes the current physical state limits of the battery.

outputs.name: bess_power_w
outputs.description: The actual power absorbed or injected after applying constraints

outputs.name: max_available_charge
outputs.description: Max kW that can be charged.

outputs.name: max_available_discharge
outputs.description: Max kW that can be discharged.

inputs.name: bess_allocation_w
inputs.description: Power requested from the network (Positive = Charge, Negative = Discharge)
